headline: Five Below and Builders FirstSource have been highlighted as Zacks Bull and Bear of the Day
summary: Five Below raised FY26 guidance after strong sales and earnings growth, while Builders FirstSource faces pressure from weak demand and margin strain.

raw.headline: Five Below and Builders FirstSource have been highlighted as Zacks Bull and Bear of the Day
raw.summary: Five Below raised FY26 guidance after strong sales and earnings growth, while Builders FirstSource faces pressure from weak demand and margin strain.

headline: Bear of the Day: Builders FirstSource (BLDR)
summary: Quarterly results have largely skewed sentiment around BLDR, with the company falling short of the Zacks Consensus EPS estimate by double-digit percentages in back-to-back releases.

raw.headline: Bear of the Day: Builders FirstSource (BLDR)
